title: Turn off automated system notifications by people column
excerpt: I would like a feature that allows admin to turn off ‘system automated’ notifications on a specific people column. With this feature I could then use the ‘People Column’ to assign multiple teams to an item without sendin…

posts.author: Marcus_Millgate (Marcus Millgate)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like a feature that allows admin to turn off ‘system automated’ notifications on a specific people column. With this feature I could then use the ‘People Column’ to assign multiple teams to an item without sending out automated system ‘assigned’ notifications to entire teams. This would allow me to turn on ‘Only view assigned items’ which gives me greater flexibility with showing or hiding data on a single board.
